page.subtitle: Practice job interviews with AI-powered feedback
page.nextRoundDescription: Keep practicing with focus — every round makes you better.
page.applicationBasedDescription: Questions from a real job posting

detail.modeSwitchHint: You can switch modes at any time
detail.endedAbandonedHint: You can start a new interview to practice.

preview.questionExample: Describe a project where you worked closely with customers or stakeholders. How did you approach it?
preview.strengthText: Clear STAR structure and a concrete example with a measurable result.
preview.tipText: At the end, mention what you learned — that rounds off the answer.

mode.heading: Choose your mode
mode.lead: Practice freely for any role — or generate questions directly from one of your applications.

free.title: Free interview
free.description: full control over role, company & industry.

application.title: Based on an application
application.description: questions from the real job posting.

questions.heading: Answer the questions
questions.lead: Applo asks realistic questions. You answer in chat — at your own pace, with pause or repeat whenever you need it.

feedback.heading: Get AI feedback
feedback.lead: After every answer you receive a score plus concrete strengths and improvement tips — so every round makes you better.

intro.footnote: Tip: Structure every answer with the STAR method — it noticeably improves your score.

modeSelect.title: How would you like to practice?
modeSelect.descriptionWithVoice: Choose your interview mode. Both variants use the same questions and end with a full evaluation — you can switch at any time.
modeSelect.descriptionTextOnly: Choose your interview mode. Both variants use the same questions and end with a full evaluation.

text.title: Text chat
text.description: Write your answers calmly and at your own pace — ideal for phrasing and revising.

voice.title: Voice interview
voice.description: Have a real conversation with your AI interviewer. Speak freely, just like in an actual interview.

chat.welcome: Welcome to the interview! You will answer {count, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}}. Take your time for thoughtful answers.
chat.allQuestionsAnsweredSystem: All questions answered! Click "Complete interview" to see your overall evaluation.
chat.title: Interview simulation
chat.allQuestionsAnsweredComposer: You have answered all questions. Complete the interview to receive your overall evaluation.
chat.answerPlaceholder: Enter your answer…  (Enter to send · Shift+Enter for a new line)
chat.abandonDescription: Are you sure you want to abandon the interview? Your progress will be lost and you will not receive an overall evaluation.

voice.minutesAvailable: {count, plural, one {# min. available} other {# min. available}}
voice.remainingQuota: Remaining voice quota: {count, plural, one {# min.} other {# min.}}

toasts.timeUp: Time is up – Applo is saying goodbye.

de.wrapUp: Zeithinweis: Es verbleibt noch etwa eine Minute. Schließe das aktuelle Thema ab und stelle höchstens EINE letzte Frage.
de.timeUp: Die Zeit ist um. Bedanke dich jetzt kurz und warm, verabschiede dich und beende das Gespräch – stelle keine weiteren Fragen.

en.wrapUp: Time note: About one minute remains. Finish the current topic and ask at most ONE final question.
en.timeUp: Time is up. Give brief, warm thanks, say goodbye, and end the interview now – ask no further questions.

preCall.title: Ready for your voice interview?
preCall.description: You will have a realistic conversation with Applo, your AI interviewer. Speak freely and naturally — at the end you receive a complete evaluation.

errors.mic: No microphone access. Please allow microphone access in your browser and try again – or switch to text chat.
errors.unsupported: Your browser does not support voice interviews. Please use a current browser or switch to text chat.
errors.connect: The voice connection could not be established. Please try again or switch to text chat.

micReady.title: Microphone ready
micReady.description: Access is requested when you start

voice.durationDisabledHint: Options above your remaining time quota are disabled.
voice.minutesRemaining: {count, plural, one {# min. remaining} other {# min. remaining}}
voice.switchToText: Prefer typing? Go to text chat
voice.speakPrompt: Speak so the interviewer can respond …

feedback.noEvaluation: No evaluation available. Complete the interview first.

stats.averageScoreWithQuestions: Avg. score · {count, plural, one {# question} other {# questions}}
stats.totalSessions: of {count, plural, one {# session} other {# sessions}} total
stats.questionsAnswered: {count, plural, one {# question answered} other {# questions answered}}

progress.noStats: Complete at least one interview to see statistics.

startDialog.title: Start new interview
startDialog.description: Configure your interview practice. The AI adapts the questions to your settings.

application.helper: Questions are generated based on the job description.
application.empty: You do not have a completed application yet. Create an application first to generate suitable interview questions from it.

custom.positionPlaceholder: e.g. project manager, nurse, sales lead
custom.jobDescriptionPlaceholder: Paste the job description to receive more specific questions...

hooks.completeSuccess: Interview completed! Feedback is being generated...
hooks.voiceStartError: Voice interview could not be started
